context.task: Media Monitoring Product Enhancement - Create comprehensive specifications
context.note: Document already exists from April 1, 2026. All 5 required specification areas present and verified.

specification_areas.report_format: ✅ Section 2 - Executive Summary, 30-day analysis, sentiment framework, trend visualization, key findings, recommendations
specification_areas.what_to_monitor: ✅ Section 3.1 - Announcements, executives, financials, products, partnerships, legal, industry position, competitor mentions
specification_areas.platforms: ✅ Section 4 - Financial news (Reuters/Bloomberg/FT/WSJ), social (Twitter/X/LinkedIn/Reddit), regulatory sources
specification_areas.mention_tracking: ✅ Section 3.2 - Third-party mentions, competitor comparisons, industry trends, social sentiment
specification_areas.value_add: ✅ Section 6 - Benchmarking, trend analysis, geographic distribution, influencer ID, topic clustering, early warning

notes: No new build work required. Media Monitoring Product Specification v1.0 completed April 1, 2026. Document is 44KB, 40+ pages, production-ready for MVP development. AGENT_VENTURE.md and memory file updated with verification status.
